archetype: Organic & Earthy mixed with Jewel & Luxury
design_philosophy: Embrace the warmth of a Portuguese Petiscaria. Use deep, rich wine reds against warm cream backgrounds. Textures should feel like a rustic wine cellar meets fine dining. 90% mobile usage dictates a rigid, highly scannable, vertical-first layout with thumb-friendly touch targets.

headings.usage: Hero titles, section headers, menu categories. Must use tracking-tight for sizes above 32px.

body.usage: Descriptions, UI elements, button texts. Clean geometry contrasts the ornate serif.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-First Dominance. Desktop layout is secondary but must scale gracefully.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous vertical padding between sections (py-16 md:py-24).

components.header: Sticky top, backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F5F5DC]/80, border-b border-[#2C110C]/10. Must contain click-to-call icon for mobile.
components.buttons: rounded-none or highly subtle rounded-sm. Solid burgundy bg with cream text, or cream bg with gold border.
components.cards: Cardless design preferred. Use pure images with text below, or delicate 1px border-[#DAA520]/30 on cream backgrounds.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling (Lenis recommended if possible, else native smooth scroll). Parallax effect on the Hero background.
motion_and_interactions.reveal: Staggered fade-up for Menu items and Reviews. Use framer-motion.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Images scale up slightly (scale-105) inside overflow-hidden containers. Text colors shift slightly.

image_urls.description: Long corridor of wooden barrels in a winery cellar. Use with heavy wine-dark gradient overlay for text contrast.
Delicious Spanish/Portuguese tapas on a rustic wooden table.
Outdoor gathering with a variety of tapas.
Signature Mushroom Risotto on an elegant plate.
Elegant close-up of red wine being poured into a glass.
Red wine being elegantly poured into a glass against a dark backdrop. Use to anchor the 'Our Story' or 'Wine Selection' section.

sections_breakdown.description: Full height (min-h-[90vh]). Background image: wine barrels with gradient overlay. Content: Overline (Águeda, Portugal), H1 (Wine Village), Subtitle, CTA (Reserve Table / Contact), PT/EN Language Toggle in top corner.
Side-by-side on desktop, stacked on mobile. Text content explaining the 4.5 star legacy, authentic petiscos, and Portuguese wine culture. Image: Red wine pouring.
Grid layout (1 col mobile, 2/3 cols desktop). Highlight: Mushroom Risotto (Star item), Tapas, and Wine. Use images provided. Minimalist text under images.
Carousel or stacked cards showcasing top Google Reviews (mentioning 4.5 stars / 273 reviews). Use gold stars for visual trust.
Embedded Google Maps iframe (Águeda). Click-to-call button. Facebook hyperlink. Direct reservation link.
Deep wine background (#4A1C24). Gold typography. Include the 'Download HTML' button as requested.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the PT-PT primary and EN secondary language requirement. Set up a simple React state (e.g., const [lang, setLang] = useState('pt')) to toggle text across the page.

Mobile layout is critical (90% traffic). Ensure touch targets (buttons, links) are at least 44px tall. Use a sticky mobile bottom bar or highly accessible top sticky header for the 'Click-to-Call' functionality.
Implement the 'Download HTML' button at the bottom: This can be a simple JS function that creates a Blob of the document.documentElement.outerHTML and triggers a download.
Do NOT use a database. Hardcode the menu, reviews, and content in a structured JSON object within the React code.
Use Lucide-React or Phosphor Icons for social and contact icons (Phone, Facebook, Map Pin).
Apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements for testing.
Ensure all text overlapping the hero image meets WCAG AA contrast by using the specified `overlay_hero` gradient.
